name: Blood on the Clocktower
description: Blood on the Clocktower is Steven Medway's gothic social-deduction epic — a Victorian town wracked by demons, where players take secret roles (good Townsfolk, paranoid Outsiders, lying Minions, a hidden Demon) drawn from a pool of over 150 characters. A live Storyteller orchestrates the night, manipulating clues, lying to players when their abilities permit, and shaping the narrative until execution and revelation. Slowly addictive, infinitely replayable, run for upwards of twenty.
